---
layout: default
title: "Supreme Court Stays Cow Slaughter Ban; Political Nominations Intensify"
date: 2026-07-13T11:34:03.358460+00:00
summary: "The Supreme Court grants relief to the Tamil Nadu government, while election-related nominations and policy shifts dominate the national political landscape"
run_time_ist: "5:04PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 5:04PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Supreme Court relief:</strong> The Supreme Court stayed the Madras High Court’s blanket ban on cow slaughter in Tamil Nadu, providing significant interim relief to the Vijay-led state government.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I17</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I18</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I19</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Election Commission updates:</strong> The Election Commission has introduced new mandatory online registration requirements and parental SIR details for new voters to streamline the electoral process.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I30</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Ram Temple inquiry:</strong> The Supreme Court has issued a notice to the Ram Mandir Trust and the Uttar Pradesh government, seeking a status report from the SIT regarding allegations surrounding temple donations.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I35</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I36</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I37</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Rajya Sabha nominations:</strong> Three former TMC MPs have officially filed their nominations as BJP candidates for the upcoming Rajya Sabha bypolls in West Bengal.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W8</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Datia by-election:</strong> The Madhya Pradesh by-election campaign has intensified as BJP candidate Ashutosh Tiwari filed his nomination, setting the stage for a high-stakes contest against Congress.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiowFBVV95cUxQWTc0VDhabUtWU0R5dTIzZHI1LUc5ak1XbTFVVE1zZHVoOFd2Qm9ZSnRsUUh4dFBnQ0Q3X3dLbWc4dy1reGc2b0o3R3ZNdkhsbjhSVDRzc2IySFRDb2FNSHRYb3RQbWVXM2taYlZHRTVMRTgxbk9wS1VkajY4dUNabFNiUGNPS1VrMFhzZ3pRZWc1bkV6dWkyR0ZHV25pa09yQmU0?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen"
